_note: Eval cases for Agent 1. Each case: a synthetic car + expected verdict band. Grader pulls verdict from the agent's trace (compute_verdict tool call), not from the final text.

cases.input: 2021 BMW M340i xDrive, 42000 km, asking 35900 EUR, M Sport Package, Harman Kardon Sound
